{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Fisher (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Someone called out to Fisher from inside the [[workshop]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
